# MNT — Maintenance Management Module
## Feature Specification Document
**Version:** 1.0 | **Date:** 2026-03-27 | **Source:** MNT_Maintenance_Requirement.md v2.0
**Developer:** Brijesh | **Generated by:** Claude (BA + DB Architect roles)

---

## Section 1 — Module Identity & Scope

### 1.1 Module Identity

| Attribute | Value |
|---|---|
| Module Code | MNT |
| Module Name | Maintenance Management |
| Laravel Namespace | `Modules\Maintenance` |
| Laravel Module Path | `Modules/Maintenance/` |
| Route Prefix | `maintenance/` |
| Route Name Prefix | `mnt.` |
| DB Table Prefix | `mnt_` |
| Database | `tenant_db` (per-school isolated DB) |
| RBS Reference | Module Y — Maintenance & Facility Helpdesk (F.Y1.1, F.Y1.2, F.Y2.1) |
| Mobile API Prefix | `/api/v1/maintenance` (auth:sanctum) |
| Implementation Status | 0% — Greenfield |

### 1.2 In-Scope Sub-Modules

| L# | Sub-Module | Description |
|---|---|---|
| L1 | Asset Category Management | Categories (Electrical, Plumbing, IT…) with SLA, keyword rules, escalation |
| L2 | Asset Register | School asset master with QR code generation and depreciation fields |
| L3 | Asset Depreciation Tracking | Annual SLM/WDV depreciation records per asset per financial year |
| L4 | Maintenance Ticket Creation | Ticket lifecycle with auto-priority, SLA calculation, and QR prefill |
| L5 | Technician Assignment | Auto-assignment by workload + location; manual reassignment history |
| L6 | SLA & Escalation | SLA breach detection and multi-level escalation notifications |
| L7 | Preventive Maintenance | PM schedules, daily WO auto-generation, checklist completion |
| L8 | AMC Contracts & Work Orders | AMC contracts with expiry alerts; external vendor work orders with PDF print |

### 1.3 Out-of-Scope

- Student management (`std_*`) — student raises tickets via portal; STD module owns profile
- Fee management (`fin_*`) — no fee impact
- HR leave calendar — V3 future: AssignmentService currently ignores leave status
- INV parts deduction — V3 future: `parts_used` is free-text until INV module is built
- FAC journal posting — scaffold hooks only; actual journal entries deferred to FAC module

### 1.4 Module Scale

| Artifact | Count |
|---|---|
| Controllers (Web) | 8 (MaintenanceController, AssetCategoryController, AssetController, TicketController, WorkOrderController, PmScheduleController, AmcContractController, MaintenanceReportController) |
| Controllers (API) | 1 (MobileMaintenanceController) |
| Models | 11 |
| Services | 5 |
| Jobs | 4 |
| FormRequests | 11 |
| Policies | 11 |
| `mnt_*` Tables | 11 |
| Blade Views (estimated) | ~35 |
| Web Routes | ~55 |
| Mobile API Routes | ~9 |

---

## Section 2 — Entity Inventory (All 11 Tables)

> **Standard audit columns on ALL tables** (not repeated per table below):
> `id INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PK`,
> `is_active TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1`,
> `created_by INT UNSIGNED NULL FK→sys_users.id`,
> `created_at TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP`,
> `updated_at TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP`,
> `deleted_at TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL`
>
> **No `tenant_id` column** — isolation is at DB level via stancl/tenancy v3.9 (dedicated DB per tenant).

---

### Domain A — Asset Management

#### Table 1: `mnt_asset_categories`
> Category master — defines SLA targets, keyword-based auto-priority rules, and escalation levels per category.

| Column | Type | Nullable | Default | Constraints | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | INT UNSIGNED | NO | AUTO_INCREMENT | PK | |
| name | VARCHAR(100) | NO | — | UNIQUE | e.g., Electrical, Plumbing |
| code | VARCHAR(20) | YES | NULL | UNIQUE | e.g., ELEC, PLMB |
| description | TEXT | YES | NULL | | |
| default_priority | ENUM('Low','Medium','High','Critical') | NO | 'Medium' | | Fallback if no keyword match |
| sla_hours | SMALLINT UNSIGNED | NO | 24 | | Target resolution time in clock hours |
| auto_assign_role_id | INT UNSIGNED | YES | NULL | FK→sys_roles.id | Role to filter technicians for auto-assignment |
| priority_keywords_json | JSON | YES | NULL | | `{"Critical":["flood","fire"],"High":["leakage"]}` |
| sla_escalation_json | JSON | YES | NULL | | `{"L1":{"after_hours":4,"notify_role":"maintenance-incharge"},"L2":{"after_hours":8,"notify_role":"principal"}}` |
| is_active | TINYINT(1) | NO | 1 | | |
| created_by | INT UNSIGNED | YES | NULL | FK→sys_users.id | |
| created_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | | |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE | | |
| deleted_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | NULL | | Soft delete |

**Unique Constraints:**
- `UNIQUE (name)`
- `UNIQUE (code)` — nullable unique

**Indexes:**
- `idx_mnt_asset_categories_active (is_active)`
- FK index on `auto_assign_role_id`

---

#### Table 2: `mnt_assets`
> School asset register — physical items tracked for maintenance, with depreciation and QR code support.

| Column | Type | Nullable | Default | Constraints | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | INT UNSIGNED | NO | AUTO_INCREMENT | PK | |
| asset_code | VARCHAR(30) | NO | — | UNIQUE NOT NULL | MNT-AST-XXXXXX; DB lock-for-update |
| name | VARCHAR(150) | NO | — | NOT NULL | |
| category_id | INT UNSIGNED | NO | — | FK→mnt_asset_categories.id | |
| location_building | VARCHAR(100) | YES | NULL | | |
| location_floor | VARCHAR(20) | YES | NULL | | |
| location_room | VARCHAR(50) | YES | NULL | | |
| purchase_date | DATE | YES | NULL | | |
| purchase_cost | DECIMAL(12,2) | YES | NULL | | |
| salvage_value | DECIMAL(12,2) | YES | NULL | | For SLM/WDV calculation |
| useful_life_years | TINYINT UNSIGNED | YES | NULL | | For SLM calculation |
| depreciation_method | ENUM('SLM','WDV') | YES | NULL | | Straight Line / Written Down Value |
| depreciation_rate | DECIMAL(5,2) | YES | NULL | | % per year for WDV |
| accumulated_depreciation | DECIMAL(12,2) | NO | 0.00 | | Updated by DepreciationService |
| current_book_value | DECIMAL(12,2) | YES | NULL | | purchase_cost − accumulated_depreciation |
| warranty_expiry_date | DATE | YES | NULL | | |
| current_condition | ENUM('Good','Fair','Poor','Critical','Decommissioned') | NO | 'Good' | | Updated on PM WO completion |
| last_pm_date | DATE | YES | NULL | | Updated on PM WO completion |
| next_pm_due_date | DATE | YES | NULL | | For display; driven by pm_schedules |
| amc_contract_id | INT UNSIGNED | YES | NULL | FK→mnt_amc_contracts.id | |
| total_maintenance_cost | DECIMAL(12,2) | NO | 0.00 | | Recalculated on ticket close + WO completion |
| qr_code_media_id | INT UNSIGNED | YES | NULL | FK→sys_media.id | QR PNG stored via sys_media |
| photo_media_id | INT UNSIGNED | YES | NULL | FK→sys_media.id | Asset photo |
| notes | TEXT | YES | NULL | | |
| is_active | TINYINT(1) | NO | 1 | | |
| created_by | INT UNSIGNED | YES | NULL | FK→sys_users.id | |
| created_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | | |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE | | |
| deleted_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | NULL | | |

**Unique Constraints:**
- `UNIQUE (asset_code)`

**Indexes:**
- `idx_mnt_assets_category (category_id)`
- `idx_mnt_assets_active (is_active)`
- `idx_mnt_assets_condition (current_condition)`
- FK indexes: `category_id`, `amc_contract_id`, `qr_code_media_id`, `photo_media_id`, `created_by`

---

#### Table 3: `mnt_asset_depreciation`
> Annual depreciation records — one row per asset per financial year. Supports both SLM and WDV methods.

| Column | Type | Nullable | Default | Constraints | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | INT UNSIGNED | NO | AUTO_INCREMENT | PK | |
| asset_id | INT UNSIGNED | NO | — | FK→mnt_assets.id NOT NULL | |
| financial_year | VARCHAR(9) | NO | — | NOT NULL | e.g., `2025-2026` |
| method | ENUM('SLM','WDV') | NO | — | NOT NULL | Method used for this year |
| opening_book_value | DECIMAL(12,2) | NO | — | NOT NULL | Book value at start of year |
| depreciation_rate | DECIMAL(5,2) | NO | — | NOT NULL | % (SLM: derived; WDV: from asset) |
| annual_charge | DECIMAL(12,2) | NO | — | NOT NULL | Depreciation amount for year |
| closing_book_value | DECIMAL(12,2) | NO | — | NOT NULL | opening_book_value − annual_charge |
| posted_to_fac | TINYINT(1) | NO | 0 | | FAC journal hook flag |
| fac_journal_id | INT UNSIGNED | YES | NULL | — | Future FK→acc_journal_entries.id |
| created_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | | |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE | | |

> Note: No `is_active` or `deleted_at` — depreciation records are immutable once created.

**Unique Constraints:**
- `UNIQUE (asset_id, financial_year)` — BR-MNT-016: prevents double calculation for same year

**Indexes:**
- `idx_mnt_asset_depreciation_asset (asset_id)`
- `idx_mnt_asset_depreciation_year (financial_year)`

### Domain B — Ticket Management

#### Table 4: `mnt_tickets`
> Core corrective maintenance ticket table — full lifecycle from Open to Closed with SLA tracking and escalation.

| Column | Type | Nullable | Default | Constraints | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | INT UNSIGNED | NO | AUTO_INCREMENT | PK | |
| ticket_number | VARCHAR(30) | NO | — | UNIQUE NOT NULL | MNT-YYYY-XXXXXXXX |
| title | VARCHAR(200) | NO | — | NOT NULL | |
| category_id | INT UNSIGNED | NO | — | FK→mnt_asset_categories.id | |
| asset_id | INT UNSIGNED | YES | NULL | FK→mnt_assets.id | Optional |
| description | TEXT | NO | — | NOT NULL | min 20 chars enforced at form level |
| location_building | VARCHAR(100) | NO | — | NOT NULL | |
| location_floor | VARCHAR(20) | YES | NULL | | |
| location_room | VARCHAR(50) | YES | NULL | | |
| priority | ENUM('Low','Medium','High','Critical') | NO | — | NOT NULL | |
| priority_source | ENUM('Auto_Keyword','Auto_Category','Manual_Override') | NO | 'Auto_Category' | | |
| status | ENUM('Open','Accepted','In_Progress','On_Hold','Resolved','Closed','Cancelled') | NO | 'Open' | | |
| requester_user_id | INT UNSIGNED | NO | — | FK→sys_users.id NOT NULL | Staff/Student who raised ticket |
| assigned_to_user_id | INT UNSIGNED | YES | NULL | FK→sys_users.id | Current assigned technician |
| requested_date | DATE | NO | — | NOT NULL | Date ticket was raised |
| accepted_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | NULL | | Set when status→Accepted |
| resolved_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | NULL | | Set when status→Resolved |
| closed_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | NULL | | Set when status→Closed |
| sla_due_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | NULL | | created_at + category.sla_hours |
| is_sla_breached | TINYINT(1) | NO | 0 | | Set by CheckSlaBreachesJob |
| escalation_level | TINYINT UNSIGNED | NO | 0 | | 0=none, 1=L1 fired, 2=L2 fired |
| resolution_notes | TEXT | YES | NULL | | Mandatory (min 20 chars) on Resolved |
| total_hours_logged | DECIMAL(6,2) | NO | 0.00 | | Sum of mnt_ticket_time_logs.hours_spent |
| total_parts_cost | DECIMAL(10,2) | NO | 0.00 | | Sum of mnt_ticket_time_logs.parts_cost |
| requester_rating | TINYINT UNSIGNED | YES | NULL | | 1–5 stars, set on Closed |
| requester_feedback | TEXT | YES | NULL | | Optional text with rating |
| is_active | TINYINT(1) | NO | 1 | | |
| created_by | INT UNSIGNED | YES | NULL | FK→sys_users.id | |
| created_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | | |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE | | |
| deleted_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | NULL | | |

**Unique Constraints:**
- `UNIQUE (ticket_number)`

**Indexes:**
- `idx_mnt_tickets_status_priority (status, priority)` — dashboard queries
- `idx_mnt_tickets_assigned_status (assigned_to_user_id, status)` — technician views
- `idx_mnt_tickets_category_status (category_id, status)` — category reports
- `idx_mnt_tickets_sla_due (sla_due_at)` — SLA breach job
- `idx_mnt_tickets_sla_breached_status (is_sla_breached, status)` — breach dashboard
- FK indexes: `category_id`, `asset_id`, `requester_user_id`, `created_by`

#### Table 5: `mnt_ticket_assignments`
> Full assignment history per ticket — `is_current=1` marks the active assignment; all previous assignments retained for audit.

| Column | Type | Nullable | Default | Constraints | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | INT UNSIGNED | NO | AUTO_INCREMENT | PK | |
| ticket_id | INT UNSIGNED | NO | — | FK→mnt_tickets.id NOT NULL | |
| assigned_to_user_id | INT UNSIGNED | NO | — | FK→sys_users.id NOT NULL | Technician assigned |
| assigned_by_user_id | INT UNSIGNED | YES | NULL | FK→sys_users.id | Who made the assignment |
| assignment_type | ENUM('Auto','Manual','Reassigned') | NO | 'Auto' | | |
| is_current | TINYINT(1) | NO | 1 | | 1 = active assignment |
| assigned_at | TIMESTAMP | NO | CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | | |
| released_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | NULL | | Set when reassigned |
| reassign_reason | TEXT | YES | NULL | | Reason for reassignment |
| is_active | TINYINT(1) | NO | 1 | | |
| created_by | INT UNSIGNED | YES | NULL | FK→sys_users.id | |
| created_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | | |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE | | |

**Indexes:**
- `idx_mnt_ticket_assignments_ticket_current (ticket_id, is_current)` — active assignment lookup
- FK indexes: `ticket_id`, `assigned_to_user_id`, `assigned_by_user_id`

**Indexes:**

#### Table 7: `mnt_breakdown_history`
> Denormalised breakdown log per asset — auto-populated when a ticket with `asset_id` is Resolved. Enables breakdown frequency analysis.

| Column | Type | Nullable | Default | Constraints | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | INT UNSIGNED | NO | AUTO_INCREMENT | PK | |
| asset_id | INT UNSIGNED | NO | — | FK→mnt_assets.id NOT NULL | |
| ticket_id | INT UNSIGNED | YES | NULL | FK→mnt_tickets.id | Source ticket |
| breakdown_date | DATE | NO | — | NOT NULL | Date ticket was created |
| resolved_date | DATE | YES | NULL | | Date ticket was resolved |
| downtime_hours | DECIMAL(6,2) | YES | NULL | | resolved_at − created_at in hours |
| root_cause | TEXT | YES | NULL | | Optional post-resolution analysis |
| cost_incurred | DECIMAL(10,2) | NO | 0.00 | | From ticket.total_parts_cost |
| created_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | | |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE | | |

> Note: No `is_active` / `deleted_at` — history records are immutable.

**Indexes:**
- `idx_mnt_breakdown_history_asset_date (asset_id, breakdown_date)`
- FK indexes: `ticket_id`

### Domain C — Preventive Maintenance

#### Table 8: `mnt_pm_schedules`
> PM schedule definitions — recurring checklist assignments per asset.

| Column | Type | Nullable | Default | Constraints | Comment |

| asset_id | INT UNSIGNED | NO | — | FK→mnt_assets.id NOT NULL | |

| title | VARCHAR(200) | NO | — | NOT NULL | e.g., "Monthly AC Filter Cleaning" |

| checklist_items_json | JSON | NO | — | NOT NULL | Array of task strings; min 1 item |

| next_due_date | DATE | YES | NULL | | Calculated on save; advanced after WO generation |
| assign_to_role_id | INT UNSIGNED | YES | NULL | FK→sys_roles.id | Role for technician auto-assignment |
| estimated_hours | DECIMAL(4,2) | YES | NULL | | |
| last_generated_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | NULL | | Last time a WO was generated |
| is_active | TINYINT(1) | NO | 1 | | |
| created_by | INT UNSIGNED | YES | NULL | FK→sys_users.id | |
| created_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | | |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE | | |
| deleted_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | NULL | | |

**Indexes:**
- `idx_mnt_pm_schedules_asset (asset_id)`
- `idx_mnt_pm_schedules_next_due (next_due_date)` — for GeneratePmWorkOrdersJob
- `idx_mnt_pm_schedules_active (is_active)`
- FK indexes: `assign_to_role_id`, `category_id`

#### Table 9: `mnt_pm_work_orders`
> Auto-generated PM work orders — created daily by `GeneratePmWorkOrdersJob` when schedule is due.

| Column | Type | Nullable | Default | Constraints | Comment |

| status | ENUM('Pending','In_Progress','Completed','Overdue','Cancelled') | NO | 'Pending' | | |
| checklist_completion_json | JSON | YES | NULL | | `[{"item":"Clean filter","done":true,"notes":"..."}]` |
| completed_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | NULL | | Set when status→Completed |
| hours_spent | DECIMAL(4,2) | YES | NULL | | Filled by technician on completion |
| is_active | TINYINT(1) | NO | 1 | | |
| created_by | INT UNSIGNED | YES | NULL | FK→sys_users.id | |
| created_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | | |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | YES | CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE | | |

**Indexes:**
- `idx_mnt_pm_work_orders_schedule_status (pm_schedule_id, status)` — duplicate WO check (BR-MNT-006)

## Section 3 — Entity Relationship Diagram (Text-Based)

```
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  MNT MODULE — ENTITY RELATIONSHIPS
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

CROSS-MODULE READS (MNT never modifies these tables):
  sys_roles       ← mnt_asset_categories.auto_assign_role_id
                  ← mnt_pm_schedules.assign_to_role_id
  sys_users       ← mnt_tickets.requester_user_id
                  ← mnt_tickets.assigned_to_user_id
                  ← mnt_ticket_assignments.assigned_to_user_id
                  ← mnt_ticket_assignments.assigned_by_user_id
                  ← mnt_ticket_time_logs.logged_by_user_id
                  ← mnt_pm_work_orders.assigned_to_user_id
                  ← all tables.created_by
  sys_media       ← mnt_assets.qr_code_media_id (QR PNG)
                  ← mnt_assets.photo_media_id
                  ← mnt_amc_contracts.document_media_id
                  ← mnt_tickets (before/after photos — polymorphic)
  vnd_vendors     ← mnt_amc_contracts.vendor_id
                  ← mnt_work_orders.vendor_id
  sys_settings    → mnt_require_photos (key-value setting read by TicketService)

CROSS-MODULE WRITES (MNT writes to):
  sys_activity_logs ← All status transitions, assignments, escalations, priority overrides
  ntf_notifications ← Assignment alerts, SLA/escalation alerts, AMC expiry, requester updates

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  DOMAIN A — ASSET MANAGEMENT
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  mnt_asset_categories (1)
      │
      ├──[category_id]──→ mnt_assets (many)
      │                       │
      │                       ├──[asset_id]──→ mnt_asset_depreciation (many)
      │                       │               UNIQUE (asset_id, financial_year)
      │                       │
      │                       ├──[asset_id]──→ mnt_pm_schedules (many)
      │                       │
      │                       └──[amc_contract_id nullable]──→ mnt_amc_contracts
      │
      └──[auto_assign_role_id nullable]──→ sys_roles

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  DOMAIN B — TICKET MANAGEMENT
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  mnt_tickets (1)
      │
      ├──[category_id]──→ mnt_asset_categories
      ├──[asset_id nullable]──→ mnt_assets
      ├──[requester_user_id]──→ sys_users
      ├──[assigned_to_user_id nullable]──→ sys_users
      │
      ├──[ticket_id]──→ mnt_ticket_assignments (many)
      │                    ├──[assigned_to_user_id]──→ sys_users
      │                    └──[assigned_by_user_id]──→ sys_users
      │
      ├──[ticket_id]──→ mnt_ticket_time_logs (many)
      │                    └──[logged_by_user_id]──→ sys_users
      │
      └──[ticket_id nullable]──→ mnt_breakdown_history (many)
                                    └──[asset_id]──→ mnt_assets

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  DOMAIN C — PREVENTIVE MAINTENANCE
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  mnt_pm_schedules (1)
      ├──[asset_id]──→ mnt_assets
      ├──[assign_to_role_id nullable]──→ sys_roles
      └──[pm_schedule_id]──→ mnt_pm_work_orders (many)
                                └──[asset_id]──→ mnt_assets (denormalised)

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  DOMAIN D — CONTRACTS & WORK ORDERS
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  mnt_amc_contracts (1)
      ├──[vendor_id nullable]──→ vnd_vendors
      ├──[document_media_id nullable]──→ sys_media
      └──[amc_contract_id nullable]──→ mnt_assets (reverse: assets reference AMC)

  mnt_work_orders
      ├──[ticket_id nullable]──→ mnt_tickets
      ├──[amc_contract_id nullable]──→ mnt_amc_contracts
      ├──[asset_id nullable]──→ mnt_assets
      └──[vendor_id nullable]──→ vnd_vendors

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  NOTE: Circular reference managed via nullable FKs
  (mnt_assets.amc_contract_id ↔ mnt_amc_contracts.covered_assets_ids_json)
  JSON field avoids M:N table; FK is singular current AMC for asset.
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
```

## Section 4 — Business Rules (16 Rules)

| Rule ID | Rule Text | Table/Column | Enforcement Point |
|---|---|---|---|
| BR-MNT-001 | Ticket number auto-generated as MNT-YYYY-XXXXXXXX (4-digit year + 8-digit zero-padded serial). DB `lockForUpdate()` inside transaction prevents duplicate numbers under concurrent creation. | `mnt_tickets.ticket_number` | `service_layer` (TicketService + DB transaction) |
| BR-MNT-002 | `sla_due_at = ticket.created_at + category.sla_hours` (clock hours; business-hours mode deferred to V3). | `mnt_tickets.sla_due_at` | `service_layer` (TicketService::createTicket) |
| BR-MNT-003 | Status transitions enforced as strict FSM: Open→Accepted→In_Progress→(On_Hold↔In_Progress)→Resolved→Closed. Cancelled allowed from Open/Accepted/In_Progress/On_Hold by admin only. Invalid transitions return HTTP 422. | `mnt_tickets.status` | `service_layer` (TicketService::updateStatus) + `form_validation` |
| BR-MNT-004 | `resolution_notes` (min 20 chars) are mandatory when transitioning status to Resolved. Missing or too-short notes return HTTP 422. | `mnt_tickets.resolution_notes` | `form_validation` (StoreTicketStatusRequest) |
| BR-MNT-005 | Auto-assignment may leave ticket unassigned if no technician role matches or all have max workload. Ticket stays Open; Maintenance Incharge notified immediately for manual assignment. | `mnt_tickets.assigned_to_user_id` | `service_layer` (AssignmentService::autoAssign) |
| BR-MNT-006 | PM work order generation: only one Pending or In_Progress WO allowed per `pm_schedule_id` at any time. If unresolved WO exists, generation is skipped for that schedule. | `mnt_pm_work_orders.status` | `service_layer` (PmScheduleService::generateWorkOrders) |
| BR-MNT-007 | AMC expiry alerts fire at exactly 60, 30, and 7 calendar days before `end_date`. Each threshold fires once per contract — tracked by `renewal_alert_sent_60/30/7` flags set to 1 after dispatch. | `mnt_amc_contracts.renewal_alert_sent_*` | `scheduled_job` (SendAmcExpiryAlertsJob) |
| BR-MNT-008 | Technician can view/update ONLY tickets where `mnt_ticket_assignments.is_current=1 AND assigned_to_user_id = auth()->id()`. Admin and Maintenance Incharge can update any ticket. | `mnt_ticket_assignments.is_current` | `service_layer` (TicketPolicy) |
| BR-MNT-009 | Keyword priority: case-insensitive LIKE scan of `ticket.description` against `category.priority_keywords_json`. Critical > High > Medium > Low; falls back to `category.default_priority` if no keyword matches. | `mnt_tickets.priority`, `mnt_tickets.priority_source` | `service_layer` (TicketService::resolvePriority) |
| BR-MNT-010 | Before photos required when status→In_Progress; after photos required when status→Resolved. Both requirements configurable via `sys_settings` key `mnt_require_photos`. | `sys_media` (photos), `mnt_tickets.status` | `service_layer` (TicketService::updateStatus) + `form_validation` |
| BR-MNT-011 | SLA escalation levels: EscalationService reads `category.sla_escalation_json` after each SLA breach check. If ticket age > L1.after_hours and `escalation_level < 1`, notify L1 role and set `escalation_level=1`. Repeat for L2. | `mnt_tickets.escalation_level`, `mnt_asset_categories.sla_escalation_json` | `service_layer` (EscalationService::checkEscalations) called by CheckSlaBreachesJob |
| BR-MNT-012 | `asset.total_maintenance_cost` = SUM(ticket.total_parts_cost for closed tickets with that asset) + SUM(work_order.actual_cost for completed WOs with that asset). Recalculated on ticket close and WO completion. | `mnt_assets.total_maintenance_cost` | `service_layer` (TicketService + WorkOrderController::complete) |
| BR-MNT-013 | PM WO marked Overdue if `due_date < TODAY` and `status IN ('Pending','In_Progress')`. Batch update run in daily cron. | `mnt_pm_work_orders.status` | `scheduled_job` (MarkOverduePmWorkOrdersJob daily 07:00) |
| BR-MNT-014 | When a ticket with `asset_id` is Resolved, auto-insert a record into `mnt_breakdown_history`. `downtime_hours = resolved_at − created_at` in hours. | `mnt_breakdown_history` | `service_layer` (TicketService::updateStatus post-hook — direct insert, not event) |
| BR-MNT-015 | QR code auto-generated via SimpleSoftwareIO/simple-qrcode on first save of an asset. Stored as `sys_media` record; `qr_code_media_id` updated. Regenerated if `asset_code` changes. | `mnt_assets.qr_code_media_id` | `model_event` (Asset::saved observer) / `service_layer` (AssetController) |
| BR-MNT-016 | `mnt_asset_depreciation` UNIQUE `(asset_id, financial_year)` — running DepreciationService twice for same asset + year returns validation error (DB constraint violation caught and returned as 422). | `mnt_asset_depreciation` UNIQUE constraint | `db_constraint` + `service_layer` (DepreciationService pre-check) |

---

## Section 5 — Workflow State Machines (4 FSMs)

### FSM 1 — Ticket Lifecycle

```
States: Open | Accepted | In_Progress | On_Hold | Resolved | Closed | Cancelled

                    ┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
                    │              CANCELLED                  │
                    │ (Admin only, from any pre-Resolved state)│
                    └────────────────┬────────────────────────┘
                                     ↑ cancel
    ┌──────────┐   accept    ┌──────────────┐  start work  ┌────────────────┐
    │  Open    │────────────→│   Accepted   │─────────────→│  In_Progress   │
    └──────────┘             └──────────────┘              └──────┬─────────┘
         ↑                                                        │         ↑
     (auto-assign                                           hold  ↓         │ resume
      or manual)                                        ┌──────────────┐    │
                                                        │  On_Hold     │────┘
                                                        └──────────────┘
                                                                │ resolve
                                                                ↓
                                                        ┌──────────────┐
                                                        │   Resolved   │
                                                        └──────┬───────┘
                                                               │ close (admin/system)
                                                               ↓
                                                        ┌──────────────┐
                                                        │   Closed     │
                                                        └──────────────┘
```

**Valid Transitions:**

| From | To | Trigger | Pre-conditions | Side Effects |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Open | Accepted | Technician accepts or admin assigns | Technician assigned (`is_current=1` exists) | Set `accepted_at`; `mnt_ticket_assignments` record created; requester notified via NTF; log to `sys_activity_logs` |
| Accepted | In_Progress | Technician starts work | — | Before photos required (if `mnt_require_photos=1`); set status; requester notified |
| In_Progress | On_Hold | Technician pauses | — | Log reason (optional); notify Maintenance Incharge |
| On_Hold | In_Progress | Resume | — | Update status |
| In_Progress | Resolved | Technician resolves | `resolution_notes` present + min 20 chars; after photos required (if setting enabled) | Set `resolved_at`; auto-insert `mnt_breakdown_history` if `asset_id` set (BR-MNT-014); requester notified; `total_parts_cost` finalized |
| Resolved | Closed | Admin/system closes | — | Set `closed_at`; recalculate `asset.total_maintenance_cost` (BR-MNT-012); queue rating prompt to requester |
| Open/Accepted/In_Progress/On_Hold | Cancelled | Admin cancels | `admin` or `maintenance-incharge` role | Log reason; notify assigned technician |

---

### FSM 2 — PM Work Order Lifecycle

```
States: Pending | In_Progress | Completed | Overdue | Cancelled

  [Schedule Due] ──(GeneratePmWorkOrdersJob)──→ ┌─────────┐
                                                 │ Pending │
                                                 └────┬────┘
                                                      │ technician starts
                                                      ↓
                                              ┌─────────────┐
                                              │ In_Progress │
                                              └──────┬──────┘
                                                     │ all checklist items checked
                                                     ↓
                                              ┌───────────┐
                                              │ Completed │
                                              └───────────┘

  If due_date < TODAY and status ∈ {Pending, In_Progress}:
                         ──(MarkOverduePmWorkOrdersJob)──→ ┌─────────┐
                                                           │ Overdue │
                                                           └─────────┘

  Admin can cancel at any pre-Completed state → [Cancelled]
```

**Side Effects:**
- On **Completed**: `asset.last_pm_date` = today; `asset.current_condition` updated from checklist; `pm_schedule.next_due_date` advanced by recurrence interval; `pm_schedule.last_generated_at` updated.
- Completion triggers `asset.next_pm_due_date` refresh.

---

### FSM 3 — AMC Expiry Alert Flow

```
Daily Cron: SendAmcExpiryAlertsJob (08:00)

  Query: mnt_amc_contracts WHERE status='Active'
         AND end_date BETWEEN NOW() AND DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY)
  │
  ├── end_date ≤ NOW + 7d  AND renewal_alert_sent_7=0
  │     → Dispatch NTF to Maintenance Incharge: "AMC [title] expires in ~7 days"
  │     → SET renewal_alert_sent_7=1
  │
  ├── end_date ≤ NOW + 30d AND renewal_alert_sent_30=0
  │     → Dispatch NTF: "AMC expires in ~30 days"
  │     → SET renewal_alert_sent_30=1
  │
  └── end_date ≤ NOW + 60d AND renewal_alert_sent_60=0
        → Dispatch NTF: "AMC expires in ~60 days"
        → SET renewal_alert_sent_60=1

  Separate query: WHERE end_date < NOW() AND status='Active'
        → UPDATE status='Expired'
```

**Rule:** Flags are checked in priority order (7 → 30 → 60) to prevent triggering multiple alerts on same run. Each threshold fires exactly once per contract.

---

### FSM 4 — QR Code Scan-to-Report Flow

```
  Field staff scans QR code printed on physical asset label
        ↓
  Mobile browser: GET /maintenance/tickets/create?asset_id={id}
        ↓
  ┌─────────────────────────────┐
  │  Authenticated?             │
  │  YES → Ticket form pre-filled│  asset name, location_building, location_floor,
  │         from mnt_assets     │  location_room auto-populated
  │  NO  → Redirect to login   │
  └─────────────────────────────┘
        ↓
  Staff fills: title (required), description (min 20 chars), category_id
  Optionally: attach photos (up to 5)
        ↓
  POST /maintenance/tickets  →  TicketService::createTicket()
        │
        ├── Step 2: resolvePriority(description, category)
        │           Keyword scan → Critical > High > Medium > Low
        │           Fallback: category.default_priority
        ├── Step 3: sla_due_at = now() + category.sla_hours
        ├── Step 4: lockForUpdate() → generate ticket_number
        ├── Step 5: INSERT mnt_tickets (status=Open)
        ├── Step 6: COMMIT
        ├── Step 7: AssignmentService::autoAssign($ticket)
        ├── Step 8: If assigned → INSERT mnt_ticket_assignments; NTF → technician
        └── Step 9: If unassigned → NTF → Maintenance Incharge
```

---

## Section 6 — Functional Requirements Summary (11 FRs)

| FR ID | Name | Sub-Module | Tables Used | Key Validations | Related BRs | Depends On |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| FR-MNT-01 | Asset Category Management | L1 | `mnt_asset_categories`, `sys_roles` | name unique; sla_hours > 0; JSON valid format | BR-MNT-009, BR-MNT-011 | System (sys_roles) |
| FR-MNT-02 | Asset Register | L2 | `mnt_assets`, `sys_media`, `mnt_amc_contracts` | asset_code unique; QR generated on save; depreciation fields conditional on method | BR-MNT-015, BR-MNT-012 | VND (vnd_vendors), FR-MNT-01 |
| FR-MNT-03 | Asset Depreciation | L3 | `mnt_asset_depreciation`, `mnt_assets` | UNIQUE (asset_id, financial_year); SLM: useful_life_years required; WDV: depreciation_rate required | BR-MNT-016 | FR-MNT-02 |
| FR-MNT-04 | Ticket Creation | L4 | `mnt_tickets`, `mnt_asset_categories`, `mnt_assets` | ticket_number unique (lock-for-update); description min 20 chars; location_building required | BR-MNT-001, BR-MNT-002, BR-MNT-009 | FR-MNT-01, FR-MNT-02 |
| FR-MNT-05 | Technician Assignment | L5 | `mnt_ticket_assignments`, `sys_users`, `sys_roles` | Assignment history retained; reassign reason required; is_current managed atomically | BR-MNT-005, BR-MNT-008 | FR-MNT-04, System |
| FR-MNT-06 | Ticket Status Lifecycle & SLA | L4 + L6 | `mnt_tickets`, `mnt_ticket_time_logs`, `mnt_breakdown_history`, `sys_media` | FSM transitions; resolution_notes min 20 chars on Resolved; before/after photos conditional | BR-MNT-003, BR-MNT-004, BR-MNT-010, BR-MNT-011, BR-MNT-012, BR-MNT-014 | FR-MNT-04, FR-MNT-05 |
| FR-MNT-07 | Preventive Maintenance | L7 | `mnt_pm_schedules`, `mnt_pm_work_orders`, `mnt_assets` | checklist_items_json min 1 item; no duplicate WO per schedule; next_due_date advances on WO generation | BR-MNT-006, BR-MNT-013 | FR-MNT-02 |
| FR-MNT-08 | AMC Contracts | L8 | `mnt_amc_contracts`, `vnd_vendors`, `sys_media` | end_date > start_date; alert flags reset on renewal; covered_assets_ids_json valid asset IDs | BR-MNT-007 | VND module, FR-MNT-02 |
| FR-MNT-09 | External Vendor Work Orders | L8 | `mnt_work_orders`, `mnt_tickets`, `mnt_amc_contracts`, `vnd_vendors` | wo_number unique; actual_cost required on Completed; DomPDF PDF generation | BR-MNT-012 | FR-MNT-04, FR-MNT-08 |
| FR-MNT-10 | Maintenance Calendar | — | `mnt_pm_work_orders`, `mnt_work_orders`, `mnt_amc_contracts` | Date range filter; colour-coded event types | — | FR-MNT-07, FR-MNT-08, FR-MNT-09 |
| FR-MNT-11 | Dashboard & Reports | — | All mnt_* tables | Date-range filters; CSV export; indexed queries | BR-MNT-012 | All FR-MNT-* |

| Permission Slug | Admin | Principal | Admin/Office Staff | Teacher/Student | Maint Incharge | Technician | Policy Class |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `tenant.mnt-asset-category.view` | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | ✓ | AssetCategoryPolicy |
| `tenant.mnt-asset-category.manage` | ✓ | — | — | — | ✓ | — | AssetCategoryPolicy |
| `tenant.mnt-asset.view` | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | ✓ | AssetPolicy |
| `tenant.mnt-asset.manage` | ✓ | — | — | — | ✓ | — | AssetPolicy |
| `tenant.mnt-ticket.create` | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ (limited) | ✓ | ✓ | TicketPolicy |
| `tenant.mnt-ticket.view` | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | own only | TicketPolicy |
| `tenant.mnt-ticket.update` | ✓ | — | — | — | ✓ | assigned only | TicketPolicy |
| `tenant.mnt-ticket.manage` | ✓ | — | — | — | ✓ | — | TicketPolicy |
| `tenant.mnt-pm-schedule.manage` | ✓ | — | — | — | ✓ | — | PmSchedulePolicy |
| `tenant.mnt-pm-work-order.update` | ✓ | — | — | — | ✓ | assigned only | PmWorkOrderPolicy |
| `tenant.mnt-amc-contract.manage` | ✓ | — | — | — | ✓ | — | AmcContractPolicy |
| `tenant.mnt-work-order.manage` | ✓ | — | — | — | ✓ | — | WorkOrderPolicy |
| `tenant.mnt-report.view` | ✓ | ✓ | — | — | ✓ | — | MaintenanceReportPolicy |

**Notes:**
- **Technician (`tenant.mnt-ticket.view`):** Can only view tickets where `mnt_ticket_assignments.is_current=1 AND assigned_to_user_id = auth()->id()` (BR-MNT-008 enforced in TicketPolicy).
- **Technician (`tenant.mnt-ticket.update`):** Same scope restriction — assigned tickets only.
- **Student (limited `tenant.mnt-ticket.create`):** Can raise tickets for common areas; cannot assign priority; cannot view other tickets.
- **Complete Policy class list (11):** AssetCategoryPolicy, AssetPolicy, AssetDepreciationPolicy, TicketPolicy, TicketAssignmentPolicy, TicketTimeLogPolicy, PmSchedulePolicy, PmWorkOrderPolicy, AmcContractPolicy, WorkOrderPolicy, MaintenanceReportPolicy.

## Section 8 — Service Architecture (5 Services)

---

### 8.1 TicketService

```
Service:     TicketService
File:        app/Services/TicketService.php
Namespace:   Modules\Maintenance\app\Services
Depends on:  AssignmentService, EscalationService
Fires:       NTF notifications (assignment, status changes, requester updates)
             sys_activity_logs entries for all state changes

Key Methods:

  createTicket(array $data, User $requester): Ticket
    └── Full 10-step sequence (see pseudocode below)

  updateStatus(Ticket $ticket, string $newStatus, array $data, User $actor): Ticket
    └── Validates FSM transition (BR-MNT-003); throws 422 on invalid
    └── Enforces resolution_notes min 20 chars on Resolved (BR-MNT-004)
    └── Enforces before/after photos via sys_settings check (BR-MNT-010)
    └── Sets accepted_at / resolved_at / closed_at timestamps
    └── On Resolved with asset_id: inserts mnt_breakdown_history (BR-MNT-014)
    └── On Closed: recalculates asset.total_maintenance_cost (BR-MNT-012)
    └── Logs to sys_activity_logs; dispatches NTF notification to requester

  manualAssign(Ticket $ticket, User $technician, string $reason, User $actor): void
    └── Sets previous assignment is_current=0, released_at=now()
    └── Inserts new mnt_ticket_assignments (is_current=1, type=Manual/Reassigned)
    └── Updates ticket.assigned_to_user_id
    └── Notifies technician via NTF

  overridePriority(Ticket $ticket, string $priority, string $reason, User $actor): void
    └── Updates ticket.priority, sets priority_source='Manual_Override'
    └── Logs reason to sys_activity_logs
    └── Re-triggers autoAssign if escalated to Critical and currently unassigned

  storeTimeLog(Ticket $ticket, array $data, User $technician): TicketTimeLog
    └── Creates mnt_ticket_time_logs record
    └── Recalculates ticket.total_hours_logged and ticket.total_parts_cost

  rate(Ticket $ticket, int $rating, ?string $feedback, User $requester): void
    └── Sets ticket.requester_rating and ticket.requester_feedback
    └── Validates rating ∈ [1,5]; ticket must be Closed

  resolvePriority(string $description, AssetCategory $category): array
    └── Returns ['priority' => 'High', 'source' => 'Auto_Keyword']
    └── Case-insensitive LIKE scan; Critical > High > Medium > Low
```

**Ticket Creation Pseudocode:**
```
createTicket(array $data, User $requester): Ticket
  Step 1: DB::beginTransaction()
  Step 2: Determine priority
           → resolvePriority($data['description'], $category)
           → Case-insensitive LIKE scan against category.priority_keywords_json
           → Critical > High > Medium > Low → fallback: category.default_priority
           → Sets priority_source = 'Auto_Keyword' or 'Auto_Category'
  Step 3: Calculate sla_due_at = Carbon::now() + category.sla_hours (hours)
           → Uses school timezone from sys_settings key 'timezone'
  Step 4: DB::table('mnt_tickets')->lockForUpdate()
           → Get max(id) or counter → generate ticket_number MNT-YYYY-XXXXXXXX
  Step 5: INSERT mnt_tickets (status='Open', priority, priority_source, sla_due_at,
                               requester_user_id, requested_date=today, ...)
  Step 6: DB::commit()
  Step 7: AssignmentService::autoAssign($ticket) — runs OUTSIDE transaction
  Step 8: If $assignedTechnician:
           → INSERT mnt_ticket_assignments (is_current=1, type='Auto')
           → UPDATE tickets.assigned_to_user_id
           → Dispatch NTF: "New ticket: {title} — {location} — Priority: {level}"
  Step 9: If unassigned:
           → Dispatch NTF to Maintenance Incharge: "Unassigned ticket requires manual routing"
  Step 10: Log to sys_activity_logs (event='ticket.created', subject=mnt_tickets, properties=JSON)
```

---

### 8.2 AssignmentService

```
Service:     AssignmentService
File:        app/Services/AssignmentService.php
Namespace:   Modules\Maintenance\app\Services
Depends on:  (none)
Fires:       (delegates NTF dispatch to TicketService caller)

Key Methods:

  autoAssign(Ticket $ticket): ?User
    └── Filter: sys_users WHERE has role = category.auto_assign_role_id AND is_active=1
    └── Score each candidate:
         → open_ticket_count (from mnt_ticket_assignments is_current=1) → lower = better
         → location match bonus: +10 if user's default location matches ticket location
    └── Returns User with highest score (lowest open tickets + location bonus)
    └── Returns null if no candidates (BR-MNT-005)

  manualReassign(Ticket $ticket, User $technician, string $reason, User $actor): void
    └── Delegates to TicketService::manualAssign()

  getWorkloadByRole(int $roleId): Collection
    └── Returns technicians in role with their open ticket count
    └── Used by dashboard technician workload chart (FR-MNT-11.1)
```

---

### 8.3 PmScheduleService

```
Service:     PmScheduleService
File:        app/Services/PmScheduleService.php
Namespace:   Modules\Maintenance\app\Services
Depends on:  AssignmentService
Fires:       NTF notifications (PM WO assignment)
             sys_activity_logs entries

Key Methods:

  generateWorkOrders(Carbon $date = null): int
    └── Query: mnt_pm_schedules WHERE is_active=1 AND next_due_date <= $date
    └── For each schedule:
         → BR-MNT-006: Check if mnt_pm_work_orders with status IN ('Pending','In_Progress')
                         exists for this pm_schedule_id → skip if exists
         → INSERT mnt_pm_work_orders (status='Pending', due_date=next_due_date)
         → AssignmentService::autoAssign equivalent for PM (by assign_to_role_id)
         → Advance schedule.next_due_date by recurrence interval
         → UPDATE pm_schedule.last_generated_at
    └── Returns count of work orders created

  completeWorkOrder(PmWorkOrder $wo, array $checklistData): void
    └── Validates all checklist items are marked done
    └── Updates wo.checklist_completion_json, wo.status='Completed', wo.completed_at, wo.hours_spent
    └── Updates mnt_assets: last_pm_date=today, current_condition (from checklist meta)
    └── Advances pm_schedule.next_due_date
    └── Logs to sys_activity_logs

  markOverdue(): int
    └── UPDATE mnt_pm_work_orders SET status='Overdue'
        WHERE due_date < CURDATE() AND status IN ('Pending','In_Progress')
    └── Returns count of records updated (BR-MNT-013)
```

---

### 8.4 EscalationService

```
Service:     EscalationService
File:        app/Services/EscalationService.php
Namespace:   Modules\Maintenance\app\Services
Depends on:  (none — reads category JSON, dispatches NTF)
Fires:       NTF notifications (L1 to Maintenance Incharge, L2 to Principal)
             sys_activity_logs (event='ticket.escalated')

Key Methods:

  checkEscalations(Ticket $ticket): void
    └── Reads $ticket->category->sla_escalation_json
    └── ticket_age_hours = now() - ticket.created_at (in hours)
    └── For L1: if ticket_age_hours >= L1.after_hours AND ticket.escalation_level < 1:
         → Dispatch NTF to sys_users with role matching L1.notify_role
         → UPDATE ticket.escalation_level = 1
         → Log to sys_activity_logs
    └── For L2: if ticket_age_hours >= L2.after_hours AND ticket.escalation_level < 2:
         → Dispatch NTF to sys_users with role matching L2.notify_role
         → UPDATE ticket.escalation_level = 2
         → Log to sys_activity_logs

  Note: Called by CheckSlaBreachesJob only for tickets where is_sla_breached=1
```

---

### 8.5 DepreciationService

```
Service:     DepreciationService
File:        app/Services/DepreciationService.php
Namespace:   Modules\Maintenance\app\Services
Depends on:  (none)
Fires:       (FAC hook scaffold only — future integration)

Key Methods:

  calculateSLM(Asset $asset, string $financialYear): AssetDepreciation
    └── Validates: asset.purchase_cost, asset.salvage_value, asset.useful_life_years set
    └── annual_charge = (purchase_cost − salvage_value) / useful_life_years
    └── opening_book_value = purchase_cost − asset.accumulated_depreciation
    └── closing_book_value = opening_book_value − annual_charge
    └── DB constraint check (BR-MNT-016): if record exists for (asset_id, financial_year) → throw ValidationException
    └── INSERT mnt_asset_depreciation record
    └── UPDATE asset.accumulated_depreciation += annual_charge
    └── UPDATE asset.current_book_value = closing_book_value

  calculateWDV(Asset $asset, string $financialYear): AssetDepreciation
    └── Validates: asset.depreciation_rate, asset.purchase_cost set
    └── opening_book_value = asset.current_book_value ?? asset.purchase_cost
    └── annual_charge = opening_book_value × (depreciation_rate / 100)
    └── closing_book_value = opening_book_value − annual_charge
    └── Same insert/update flow as SLM
    └── Scaffold: if $asset->fac_posting_enabled → call FAC hook stub

  recalculateBookValue(Asset $asset): void
    └── SUM all mnt_asset_depreciation.annual_charge for asset
    └── UPDATE asset.accumulated_depreciation and current_book_value
```

## Section 9 — Integration Contracts (5 Events/Hooks)

| Event / Hook | Fired By | Listener / Target | Payload | Action |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Assignment Notification | TicketService::createTicket / manualAssign | NTF module (ntf_notifications) | `{ticket_number, title, location_building, location_room, priority, ticket_url}` | Push/in-app notification to assigned technician: "New ticket: {title} — {location} — Priority: {level}" |
| SLA Breach Escalation (L1) | EscalationService::checkEscalations (called by CheckSlaBreachesJob) | NTF module → Maintenance Incharge role users | `{ticket_number, title, category, sla_due_at, hours_overdue, ticket_url}` | Notify Maintenance Incharge: "SLA breach escalated (L1): Ticket {number} is {X} hours overdue" |
| SLA Breach Escalation (L2) | EscalationService::checkEscalations | NTF module → Principal role users | Same payload as L1 | Notify Principal: "Critical escalation (L2): Ticket {number} requires immediate attention" |
| AMC Expiry Alert | SendAmcExpiryAlertsJob | NTF module → Maintenance Incharge role users | `{contract_number, contract_title, vendor_name, end_date, days_remaining, contract_url}` | "AMC Contract '{title}' expires in {days} days — please initiate renewal" |
| Breakdown History Hook | TicketService::updateStatus (Resolved transition with asset_id) | Direct INSERT → `mnt_breakdown_history` | Internal — no event; direct DB write | `breakdown_date = ticket.created_at::date`, `resolved_date = today`, `downtime_hours = (resolved_at - created_at) in hours`, `cost_incurred = ticket.total_parts_cost` |
| FAC Cost Posting Scaffold | WorkOrderController::complete + TicketService::updateStatus (Closed) | Stub method — future FAC module | `{asset_id, amount, wo_number/ticket_number, cost_type}` | Placeholder method logs intent to `sys_activity_logs`; actual journal entry deferred until FAC module built |

**Assignment Notification Payload (detailed):**
```json
{
  "type": "mnt.ticket.assigned",
  "ticket_number": "MNT-2026-00000042",
  "title": "AC not cooling in Lab 3",
  "location": "Main Block, Floor 2, Room 204",
  "priority": "High",
  "category": "HVAC",
  "sla_due_at": "2026-03-28T14:30:00+05:30",
  "ticket_url": "/maintenance/tickets/42"
}
```

**SLA Escalation L2 Payload (detailed):**
```json
{
  "type": "mnt.ticket.escalated.L2",
  "ticket_number": "MNT-2026-00000042",
  "title": "AC not cooling in Lab 3",
  "category": "HVAC",
  "sla_due_at": "2026-03-28T14:30:00+05:30",
  "hours_overdue": 12,
  "escalation_level": 2,
  "ticket_url": "/maintenance/tickets/42"
}
```

## Section 10 — Non-Functional Requirements

| Category | Requirement | Implementation Note |
|---|---|---|
| Performance | Ticket list < 2s for 10,000 tickets | Composite indexes `(status, priority)` and `(assigned_to_user_id, status)` on `mnt_tickets`; avoid N+1 via eager-loading `category`, `assignment`, `assignee` |
| Concurrency | No duplicate ticket numbers under concurrent creation | `DB::table('mnt_tickets')->lockForUpdate()` inside `DB::transaction()` in TicketService::createTicket (BR-MNT-001) |
| Mobile API | JSON responses < 20 KB per page (20 items) | MobileMaintenanceController uses `select()` to return only needed fields; paginate(20); no nested eager loading |
| SLA Timezone | All SLA calculations timezone-aware | `Carbon::now(sys_settings.timezone)` — school timezone read from `sys_settings` key `timezone`; falls back to `Asia/Kolkata` |
| Security | Technician cannot access unassigned tickets | TicketPolicy::view/update checks `mnt_ticket_assignments.is_current=1 AND assigned_to_user_id = auth()->id()` (BR-MNT-008) |
| Audit Trail | All transitions, assignments, overrides, escalations logged | Writes to `sys_activity_logs`: `subject_type='Modules\Maintenance\app\Models\Ticket'`, `subject_id`, `event`, `properties` JSON |
| PDF | Work orders printable via DomPDF | `barryvdh/laravel-dompdf` (already installed); A4 portrait; school header + logo via `sch_school_profiles`; `WorkOrderController::pdf()` → return PDF download |
| QR Code | Asset QR codes print-ready | `SimpleSoftwareIO/simple-qrcode` v4.2 (already installed); generates PNG stored to `sys_media`; `collection_name='mnt-asset-qr'`; min 300×300 for print quality |
| Scalability | 100,000-row ticket table without full scans | All dashboard queries use indexed columns; `mnt_tickets` has 5 composite indexes covering status/priority, assignee/status, category/status, sla_due_at, breach/status |
| Queues | All notifications via Laravel Queue | `config/queue.php` database driver (Redis for production); `AssignmentService`, `EscalationService`, `SendAmcExpiryAlertsJob` dispatch via `dispatch()` |

**Settings Key Reference** (`sys_settings` table, key-value):
| Key | Default | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| `mnt_require_photos` | `1` | Enforce before/after photo uploads (BR-MNT-010) |
| `timezone` | `Asia/Kolkata` | Used for SLA due time and escalation calculations |

## Section 11 — Test Plan Outline

### Feature Tests (Pest) — 11 test files

| File | Class | Key Scenarios |
|---|---|---|
| `TicketCreationTest.php` | `TicketCreationTest` | Create ticket; "water leakage" in description → priority=High (keyword match); no keyword → fallback to category.default_priority; ticket_number format validation; sla_due_at set correctly |
| `AutoAssignmentTest.php` | `AutoAssignmentTest` | Two technicians in matching role → assign to one with fewer open tickets; no technician available → ticket unassigned; Maintenance Incharge notified |
| `TicketStatusTransitionTest.php` | `TicketStatusTransitionTest` | Valid: Open→Accepted→In_Progress→Resolved→Closed; Invalid: Open→Resolved returns 422; Resolved without resolution_notes returns 422; Cancelled from In_Progress by admin |
| `SlaBreachTest.php` | `SlaBreachTest` | sla_due_at in past → CheckSlaBreachesJob sets is_sla_breached=1; already resolved tickets not affected |
| `SlaEscalationTest.php` | `SlaEscalationTest` | Ticket breached for L1.after_hours → L1 notification dispatched; escalation_level=1; further breach → L2 notification; escalation_level=2; no double-fire |
| `ResolutionNotesTest.php` | `ResolutionNotesTest` | Status→Resolved without notes → 422; notes < 20 chars → 422; valid notes → success |
| `TimeLogTest.php` | `TimeLogTest` | Time log added → ticket.total_hours_logged updated; parts_cost added → ticket.total_parts_cost updated |
| `PmWorkOrderGenerationTest.php` | `PmWorkOrderGenerationTest` | Schedule next_due_date=today → WO created; Pending WO exists → skip (BR-MNT-006); WO assigned to technician in role |
| `PmChecklistCompletionTest.php` | `PmChecklistCompletionTest` | All checklist items complete → WO status=Completed; asset.last_pm_date updated; next_due_date advanced |
| `AmcExpiryAlertTest.php` | `AmcExpiryAlertTest` | AMC end_date 30 days away → alert dispatched; renewal_alert_sent_30=1; job runs again → no second alert; 7-day threshold fires separately |
| `TechnicianAuthorizationTest.php` | `TechnicianAuthorizationTest` | Technician updates own assigned ticket → 200; updates another technician's ticket → 403; Admin updates any ticket → 200 |

### Unit Tests — 3 test files

| File | Class | Key Scenarios |
|---|---|---|
| `AssetDepreciationTest.php` | `AssetDepreciationTest` | SLM: annual_charge = (purchase_cost − salvage_value) / useful_life_years (verified formula); WDV: annual_charge = opening_book_value × rate/100; UNIQUE constraint blocks same (asset_id, financial_year) → ValidationException |
| `KeywordPriorityTest.php` | `KeywordPriorityTest` | "WATER LEAKAGE" (upper case) matches "water leakage" keyword → case-insensitive; "flood" matches Critical AND "leakage" matches High → Critical wins; description with no keywords → returns default_priority |
| `SlaCalculationTest.php` | `SlaCalculationTest` | sla_due_at = created_at + sla_hours; timezone-aware: Carbon::now('Asia/Kolkata'); sla_hours=24 → due tomorrow same time |

### Policy Tests

| File | Class | Key Scenarios |
|---|---|---|
| `TicketPolicyTest.php` | `TicketPolicyTest` | Technician cannot update ticket assigned to another (403); Technician can update their own assigned ticket (200); Admin can update any ticket; Teacher can create but not manage; Principal can view but not update |
| `PmWorkOrderPolicyTest.php` | `PmWorkOrderPolicyTest` | Technician can update assigned PM WO; cannot update unassigned PM WO |

### Test Data

**Required Seeders:**
- `MntAssetCategorySeeder` — 9 categories (Electrical, Plumbing, IT/Computer, Carpentry, Cleaning, HVAC, Fire Safety, Civil/Structural, Sports/Ground) with keywords and SLA hours

**Required Factories:**
- `AssetCategoryFactory` — random name, code, default_priority, sla_hours
- `AssetFactory` — random asset_code (MNT-AST-XXXXXX), category FK, location fields
- `TicketFactory` — random ticket_number, status states, sla_due_at variations
- `PmScheduleFactory` — recurrence types, checklist_items_json array
- `PmWorkOrderFactory` — status variations, due_date past/present/future

**Mock Strategy:**
```php
Queue::fake();   // GeneratePmWorkOrdersJob, CheckSlaBreachesJob, SendAmcExpiryAlertsJob
Event::fake();   // Notification triggers (dispatched via Laravel events/notifications)
Storage::fake(); // QR code PNG generation, before/after photo uploads, DomPDF
```
